danger_signals.visual_form: Opponent stance changes and positioning shifts before launching attacks
danger_signals.meaning: Indicates incoming threat requiring dodge, duck, or block response

danger_signals.visual_form: Stamina bars at top of screen decrease when player or opponent gets hit
danger_signals.meaning: Critical health state; knockdown at meter exhaustion results in KO/TKO

danger_signals.visual_form: Boxer falls to canvas, opponent stands over; timer counts down from ten
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate danger of match loss if boxer cannot stand before count reaches ten

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual knockdown counter (implicit through match progression)
danger_signals.meaning: Third knockdown in a single match results in automatic TKO loss regardless of stamina

danger_signals.visual_form: Opponent gloves raised or positioned to defend specific zones (head/body)
danger_signals.meaning: Indicates which attack angles are defended; punches targeting covered areas will be deflected

safety_signals.visual_form: Power meter at bottom of screen fills as player lands successful punches
safety_signals.meaning: Accumulated offensive advantage; enables powerful knockout punches when full

safety_signals.visual_form: Background color behind player's face on upper left transitions from blue → green → yellow → red
safety_signals.meaning: Red indicates 'Power-Up' state where punch speed and power increase; tactical advantage window

safety_signals.visual_form: Brief stunning/shaken animation after consecutive punches land; match timer freezes temporarily
safety_signals.meaning: Opponent vulnerability window enabling instant knockdown with well-timed knockout punch

safety_signals.visual_form: Immediate aftermath of successful dodge/duck/block, opponent briefly exposed
safety_signals.meaning: Safe moment to launch counter-punches with reduced risk of deflection

safety_signals.visual_form: Player can press controller buttons while opponent is down
safety_signals.meaning: Stamina meter recovers while opponent is incapacitated; tactical recovery opportunity

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Individual fighter silhouettes/caricatures (e.g., Mr. Sandman, Bald Bull, Super Macho Man)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Each opponent has distinct cartoon-like visual design with outlandish appearance; fighting style and stance variations
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Opponent positioned in boxing ring across from player; each match occurs in standard boxing arena setting

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Translucent player character model displayed from 'behind the back' perspective
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Player character remains consistent; visual feedback through stamina meter and power-up coloring
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Lower portion of screen showing player's translucent figure; upper left corner displays power-up status via background color

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Sequence of opponent faces displayed on selection screen; difficulty escalation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponent AI complexity and attack patterns increase; new attack types introduced

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Champion-tier opponents introduced with more detailed animations
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponents employ more sophisticated defensive strategies; faster attack sequences

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Anti-piracy checkpoint triggers; game verifies cartridge legitimacy via ROM checksum
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Special Circuit unlocks if anti-piracy passes; continued gameplay blocked if piracy detected

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: New tier of opponents becomes selectable; indicates legitimate cartridge status
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Most difficult opponents available for challenge; highest skill threshold matches

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Three-minute match duration; timer counts down visually
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must achieve knockout before time expires; timeout results in match loss

environmental_storytelling.example: Mr. Sandman, Bald Bull, Super Macho Man each have exaggerated cartoon features and silhouettes that communicate fighting style (e.g., Bald Bull's massive frame suggests power-based offense)
All matches occur in standard boxing arena; opponent positioning and ring mechanics create world coherence
Minor → Major → World → Special Circuits create narrative arc of protagonist climbing boxing ranks toward championship status

environmental_storytelling.visual_form: Bottom-screen power meter accumulates as player lands strikes; full meter unlocks high-damage moves
environmental_storytelling.meaning: Communicates risk-reward: aggressive play builds power; defensive play loses meter on hits

environmental_storytelling.visual_form: Background behind player face transitions blue → green → yellow → red as match progresses
environmental_storytelling.meaning: Visual heat indicator: red = maximum advantage state, communicating momentum shift in player's favor

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Changes stance/positioning before launching attack; signals incoming threat requiring defensive response
Raises or repositions gloves to defend specific zones; indicates which attack angles are currently blocked
Brief shaken animation with match timer freeze; brief vulnerability window for instant knockdown
Falls to canvas; opponent stands over; countdown timer begins from ten; cannot act until recovery
Power meter increases; stamina meter impact applied to opponent
Power meter decreases; stamina meter depletes; visual knockdown at meter exhaustion
Punch speed and power increase; tactical advantage window until next knockdown
Player can press buttons to recover stamina while opponent is incapacitated

notes: Super Punch-Out!! communicates world-state primarily through HUD elements (stamina bars, power meter, power-up background color) and opponent visual/behavioral telegraphs. The game lacks faction/political complexity; opposition is purely competitive boxing. Danger signals center on opponent guard positioning and stamina depletion. Safety signals emphasize meter accumulation and opponent vulnerability states. The progression through circuit tiers (Minor → Major → World → Special) creates implicit narrative hierarchy. Cartoon visual style and outlandish opponent designs carry personality but limited environmental storytelling. The 'dizzy' mechanic provides critical feedback for skilled play windows.
